options.label: Commercially reasonable security efforts
options.marker: Provider will use commercially reasonable efforts to secure the Service from unauthorized access

options.label: Annual reports or certifications
options.marker: Provider will maintain annually updated reports or annual certifications

options.label: Reference the CSA
options.marker: {csa_reference} The Agreement includes an additional Provider Covered Claim

options.label: Reference the CSA
options.marker: {csa_reference} The Agreement includes an additional Increased Claim

options.label: No CSA reference
options.marker: {non_csa_reference} The following is added to the end of Section 8.1

options.label: DPA-specific governing law
options.marker: Notwithstanding the governing law or similar clauses of the Agreement, all interpretations and disputes about this DPA

options.label: Contact information
options.marker: Contact information such as email, phone number, or address

options.label: Employment information
options.marker: Employment information such as employee ID or compensation

options.label: Financial information
options.marker: Financial information such as bank account numbers

options.label: Professional or biographic information
options.marker: Professional or biographic information such as resume or CV

options.label: Transactional information
options.marker: Transactional information such as account information or purchases

options.label: User activity and analysis
options.marker: User activity and analysis such as device information or IP address

options.label: Receiving data
options.marker: Receiving data, including collection, accessing, retrieval, recording, and data entry

options.label: Holding data
options.marker: Holding data, including storage, organization, and structuring

options.label: Using data
options.marker: Using data, including analysis, consultation, testing, automated decision making, and profiling

options.label: Updating data
options.marker: Updating data, including correcting, adaptation, alteration, alignment, and combination

options.label: Protecting data
options.marker: Protecting data, including restricting, encrypting, and security testing

options.label: Sharing data
options.marker: Sharing data, including disclosure, dissemination, allowing access, or otherwise making available

options.label: Returning data
options.marker: Returning data to the data exporter or data subject

options.label: Erasing data
options.marker: Erasing data, including destruction and deletion

options.label: Pseudonymization and encryption
options.marker: Pseudonymization and encryption of personal data:

options.label: Confidentiality, integrity, availability
options.marker: Ensuring ongoing confidentiality, integrity, availability, and resilience

options.label: Restore availability and access
options.marker: Ability to restore the availability of and access to Customer Personal Data

options.label: Regular testing and assessment
options.marker: Regular testing, assessment, and evaluation of the effectiveness

options.label: User authentication and authorization
options.marker: User identification and authorization process and protection:

options.label: Protect data in transit
options.marker: Protecting Customer Personal Data during transmission

options.label: Protect data during storage
options.marker: Protecting Customer Personal Data during storage

options.label: Physical security
options.marker: Physical security where Customer Personal Data is processed:

options.label: IT security governance
options.marker: Internal IT and IT security governance and management:

options.label: Process and product certification
options.marker: Certification or assurance of processes and products:

options.label: Data portability and erasure
options.marker: Allowing data portability and ensuring erasure:
